old_claim.note: Mechanical Refrigeration provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim.note: The DOMELRE was a packaged automatic electric refrigeration unit, so mechanical refrigeration is the defining process dependency.

source_shape.source_locator: ASHRAE describes DOMELRE as a package automatic electric refrigeration unit and lists refrigeration control, thermostat, air-cooled condenser, and refrigerant tubing features.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The source defines the household electric refrigerator through a packaged refrigeration unit.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Mechanical refrigeration is not optional context for a refrigerator; it is the core process being packaged for domestic electrical use.

ontology_before: Mechanical Refrigeration was retained as a broad enabling edge without source support.
ontology_after: Mechanical Refrigeration is a required, sourced process edge.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: refrigeration is tightened from enabling to required.
would_reject_if: The node is broadened to iceboxes or passive cold storage.
A separate domestic_absorption_refrigerator node is introduced and should carry different dependencies.
A stronger source shows the 1913 DOMELRE should be modeled as a detachable cooling unit rather than a refrigerator.
